function.name: task_update
function.description: Update a task's status, post a progress note, or attach a comment. Common use: 'claimed' -> 'in_progress' when work begins, 'in_progress' -> 'review' when handing off, appending 'progress' notes while working.

task_id.description: The id of the task to update

status.description: New status (optional — omit to keep current)

message.description: Progress note / reason / context to attach to the event log
